entries.title: Original plan file still contains incorrect scope (Neo4j/pgvector in Rust)
entries.closure_note: Plan completely rewritten by @architect (1469 lines, 5 CLI-side-only tasks). All Neo4j/pgvector scope removed. CTX-R1 resolved.

entries.title: MemoryKind as String not enum
entries.target: V1.1 — extract MemoryKind enum matching schema
entries.closure_note: MemoryKind enum updated with 8 variants matching schema (story_summary, research_material, review_note, character_note, world_building, plot_outline, theme_analysis, custom). Added strum::Display for serialization, FromStr for parsing. CLI commands updated to use enum. 6 new tests for enum behavior.

entries.title: Missing file I/O edge case tests (permissions, symlinks)
entries.closure_note: Added 5 edge case tests: permission-denied file (scan and generate), symlink to file, symlink to directory, broken symlink. All tests use catch_unwind to verify no panics. Tests bundled into CTX-R2 commit (file size limit).

entries.title: CLI doesn't validate WorldId format at input
entries.target: V1.1 — add clap validator for wld_ prefix pattern
entries.closure_note: WorldId validation already implemented with validate_world_id() clap validator (wld_ prefix + alphanumeric suffix). 5 unit tests covering valid formats, missing/wrong prefix, empty, special characters, and prefix-only input. Applied via #[arg(value_parser = validate_world_id)] on --world_id flag. Part of Batch A tech debt cleanup (plan v1-tech-debt-cleanup).
entries.closure_evidence: cargo test --all: 6 context validation tests pass (validate_world_id_accepts_valid_formats, _rejects_missing_prefix, _rejects_wrong_prefix, _rejects_empty, _rejects_special_characters, _rejects_only_prefix). cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings: 0 warnings. cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check: clean.
